text: Ferkisians are slug-like aliens from Ferkus 9 that appear in A Rickconvenient Mort. This contextual species page supports the API record homeworld and species context, with a spelling difference between API Ferkusian and wiki Ferkisians.
notes: No individual character page found; use Ferkisians species page as contextual source and note spelling difference with API type label Ferkusian.
